ethics.label: Ethics
ethics.description: Right vs wrong, intent vs impact, moral dilemmas

philosophy.label: Philosophy
philosophy.description: Fundamental questions about existence, knowledge, and reality

technology.label: Technology
technology.description: Innovation, digital impact, AI, and the human future

law.label: Law
law.description: Justice, legal systems, rights, and obligations

social.label: Social
social.description: Norms, community, interaction, and social change

economy.label: Economy
economy.description: Money, markets, inequality, and economic systems

life.label: Life
life.description: Meaning of life, choices, happiness, and purpose

identity.label: Identity
identity.description: Who we are, culture, gender, and selfhood

relationship.label: Relationship
relationship.description: Love, friendship, family, and human connection

career.label: Career
career.description: Work, ambition, work-life balance, and success

environment.label: Environment
environment.description: Nature, climate change, sustainability, and responsibility

religion.label: Religion
religion.description: Belief, spirituality, and the role of religion in society

psychology.label: Psychology
psychology.description: Mind, behavior, trauma, and mental health

science.label: Science
science.description: Scientific method, discovery, and the limits of knowledge

power.label: Power
power.description: Authority, control, influence, and abuse of power

future.label: Future
future.description: Predictions, hopes, fears, and future scenarios

paradox.label: Paradox
paradox.description: Contradictions, unsolvable dilemmas, and life's ironies

local.label: Local
local.description: Indonesian issues, local culture, and archipelago context

popculture.label: Pop Culture
popculture.description: Media, entertainment, trends, and popular culture influence

categories.title: Pick Your Categories
categories.body: Select one or more categories you want to explore. Each category has its own unique 3D atmosphere that appears in the background.

fusion.title: Fusion Mode
fusion.body: Select 2 or more categories to activate Fusion Mode — the 3D backgrounds blend together and a unique fusion name appears.

settings.title: Level & Timer
settings.body: Choose a difficulty level to filter questions, and optionally set a timer to keep the conversation moving.

gameplay.title: How to Play a Card
gameplay.body: Each card shows a thought-provoking question. Tap 'Hint' if you need a nudge, then 'Reveal Perspective' to see a new angle. Hit 'Next Card' to continue.
